summary: Made two surgical seam-polish edits: anchored the opening more directly to the prior chapter's dawn and added a brief stern-ferry handoff to support the next chapter's opening state.
edits: Changed the opening sentence to begin at first light, tightening the transition out of chapter 9's dawn wait.
Added a brief mention of Sereya's old funeral ferry tapping at the stern to bridge into chapter 11's opening boat configuration.
